Exec.Arguments: -WindowStyle Hidden -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$format = 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH\:mm\:ssK'; $now = [datetime]::UtcNow; $start = $now.ToString($format); $end = $now.AddDays(7).ToString($format); $params = @{ LiteralPath = 'Registry::HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WindowsUpdate\UX\Settings'; Type = 'String'; Force = $true; Verbose = $true; }; 'PauseFeatureUpdatesStartTime', 'PauseQualityUpdatesStartTime', 'PauseUpdatesStartTime' | foreach { Set-ItemProperty @params -Name $_ -Value $start; }; 'PauseFeatureUpdatesEndTime', 'PauseQualityUpdatesEndTime', 'PauseUpdatesExpiryTime' | foreach { Set-ItemProperty @params -Name $_ -Value $end; };"
